name: Inzektor Centipede
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>甲虫装機</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>インゼクター</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> センチピード
desc: Once per turn: You can equip 1 "Inzektor" monster from your hand or GY to this card. If an Equip Card(s) is sent to your GY while equipped to this card (except during the Damage Step): You can add 1 "Inzektor" card from your Deck to your hand. While this card is equipped to a monster, that monster's Level is increased by 3.
mnst_eff: Once per turn: You can equip 1 "Inzektor" monster from your hand or GY to this card. If an Equip Card(s) is sent to your GY while equipped to this card (except during the Damage Step): You can add 1 "Inzektor" card from your Deck to your hand. While this card is equipped to a monster, that monster's Level is increased by 3.
eff: Once per turn: You can equip 1 "Inzektor" monster from your hand or GY to this card. If an Equip Card(s) is sent to your GY while equipped to this card (except during the Damage Step): You can add 1 "Inzektor" card from your Deck to your hand. While this card is equipped to a monster, that monster's Level is increased by 3.

action: Equips monsters from the player's hand to itself
Equips monsters from the player's Graveyard to itself
